title: Resolve (disambiguation)
content:
'''Resolve''' may refer to:

==[[Canon]]==
*'''[[Duty and Resolve]]''', a [[lightsaber hilt]] design philosophy

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
*'''[[Resolve (cruiser)|''Resolve'']]''', a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[Cruiser/Legends|cruiser]]
*'''[[Resolve (Epoch-class)|''Resolve'']]''', an [[Epoch-class freighter|''Epoch''-class freighter]]
*'''[[Resolve (frigate)|''Resolve'']]''', a [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Frigate/Legends|frigate]]
*'''[[Resolve (New Republic Star Destroyer)|''Resolve'']]''', a New Republic [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]]

==Real world==
*"'''[[Rebel Resolve]]'''", a ''[[Star Wars Rebels]]'' episode
*"'''[[Resolve (episode)|Resolve]]'''", an episode of [[Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi (television series)|''Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi'']]
*"'''[[Resolve (short story)|Resolve]]'''", a short story by [[Alex Segura]] published in ''[[Stories of Jedi and Sith]]''

{{Disambig}}

|de=Resolve
|ka=გამბედაობა (მრავალმნიშვნელოვანი)
}}
